dest.greece.hotelsDesc: En función de la disponibilidad, alojamiento en uno de los siguientes hoteles de primera clase en cada destino.
programs.noReligiousDesc: We are currently updating our religious programs catalog. Please contact us for a tailor-made pilgrimage itinerary.
programs.relVal1Desc: Trace ancient routes of the Holy Family through Egypt\'s sacred monasteries
programs.relVal2Desc: Deeply meaningful visits with expert theologian guides who bring history to life
programs.relVal3Desc: All logistics handled — visas, hotels, transfers and full pilgrimage support included
programs.religiousCTADesc: Our spiritual travel specialists will craft a personalized pilgrimage itinerary just for you — combining sacred sites across Egypt, Jordan, and the Holy Land with premium accommodation and expert theological guides.
programs.religiousLead: Walk in the footsteps of the Holy Family through Egypt\'s ancient Coptic monasteries and discover the sacred wonders of the Holy Land. Expertly guided, spiritually enriching journeys crafted with absolute care.
programs.religiousMetaDesc: Embark on a sacred journey through ancient Coptic monasteries in Egypt and the holy sites of Jordan. Deeply spiritual, meticulously organized pilgrimages with expert guides.
tour.spanishImmersion: Una inmersión premium diseñada a la medida con servicios de primera clase.
transportation.static.subtitle: Premium Transfer Services
